TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Max Alexander kawas tay 1953, ryax sa tay 20 nqu tay 8, Max Alexander, squliq na Bunge'. (wal mhuqil sa kawas tay 2016) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: max alexan*er kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, max alexan*er, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. (wal mħuqil s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
S.FORM: Max Alexander kawas tay 1953, ryax sa tay 20 nqu tay 8, Max Alexander, squliq na Bunge'. (wal mhuqil sa kawas tay 2016) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: max alexan*er kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, max alexan*er, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. (wal mħuqil s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
